title: Employees Earning More Than Their Managers
input_format: Table: Employee with columns id (int), name (varchar), salary (int), managerId (int, nullable)
output_format: Result table with column Employee containing names of employees who earn more than their managers
example_input:
Table: Employee
| id | name  | salary | managerId |
| 1  | Joe   | 70000  | 3         |
| 2  | Henry | 80000  | 4         |
| 3  | Sam   | 60000  | NULL      |
| 4  | Max   | 90000  | NULL      |
constraints:
- 1 <= Employee.id <= 10^4
- managerId references Employee.id or is NULL
- No employee is their own manager
